content.query:
drop TABLE customer.stg_ino_control_provider_t; 

CREATE TABLE customer.stg_ino_control_provider_t
	(
	 [provideruid] nvarchar(50),
	 [lastname] nvarchar(50),
	 [firstname] nvarchar(50),
	 [middlename] nvarchar(50),
	 [companyname] nvarchar(200),
	 [npi] nvarchar(50),
	 [npitypecode] nvarchar(50),
	 [parentorganization] nvarchar(50),
	 [primarypracticeaddress] nvarchar(50),
	 [secondarypracticeaddress] nvarchar(50),
	 [practicecity] nvarchar(50),
	 [practicestate] nvarchar(50),
	 [practicezip] nvarchar(50),
	 [practicezip4] nvarchar(50),
	 [practicephone] nvarchar(50),
	 [primarybillingaddress] nvarchar(50),
	 [secondarybillingaddress] nvarchar(50),
	 [billingcity] nvarchar(50),
	 [billingstate] nvarchar(50),
	 [billingzip] nvarchar(50),
	 [billingzip4] nvarchar(50),
	 [billingphone] nvarchar(50),
	 [taxonomycode] nvarchar(50),
	 [taxonomytype] nvarchar(200),
	 [taxonomyclassification] nvarchar(200),
	 [taxonomyspecialization] nvarchar(200),
	 [sourcenameprefix] nvarchar(50),
	 [sourcename] nvarchar(200),
	 [sourcenamesuffix] nvarchar(50),
	 [sourceaddress1] nvarchar(200),
	 [sourceaddress2] nvarchar(200),
	 [sourcecity] nvarchar(50),
	 [sourcestate] nvarchar(50),
	 [sourcezip] nvarchar(50),
	 [sourcephone] nvarchar(50),
	 [createddate] nvarchar(50)
	)
WITH
	(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	 CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
	 -- HEAP
	)
GO

--Uncomment the 4 lines below to create a stored procedure for data pipeline orchestration​
--CREATE PROC bulk_load_stg_ino_control_provider_t
--AS
--BEGIN
COPY INTO customer.stg_ino_control_provider_t
(provideruid 1, lastname 2, firstname 3, middlename 4, companyname 5, npi 6, npitypecode 7, parentorganization 8, primarypracticeaddress 9, secondarypracticeaddress 10, practicecity 11, practicestate 12, practicezip 13, practicezip4 14, practicephone 15, primarybillingaddress 16, secondarybillingaddress 17, billingcity 18, billingstate 19, billingzip 20, billingzip4 21, billingphone 22, taxonomycode 23, taxonomytype 24, taxonomyclassification 25, taxonomyspecialization 26, sourcenameprefix 27, sourcename 28, sourcenamesuffix 29, sourceaddress1 30, sourceaddress2 31, sourcecity 32, sourcestate 33, sourcezip 34, sourcephone 35, createddate 36)
FROM 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/21537399/Inovalon/Inbound/control_consolidated_provider_combined.txt'
WITH
(
	FILE_TYPE = 'CSV'
	,MAXERRORS = 0
	,FIELDTERMINATOR = '|'
	,FIRSTROW = 1
	,ERRORFILE = 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/'
)
--END
GO

GO
--3363724
